Aisha Rahman
Commercial Lines Underwriter, New York, NY
aisha.rahman@example.com | 555-201-3012 | linkedin.com/in/aisha-rahman-underwriter

SUMMARY
Property & casualty insurance underwriter with 6 years evaluating and pricing
commercial risk. Strong risk assessment, loss analysis, and policy structuring
skills across middle-market accounts.

EXPERIENCE
Commercial Lines Underwriter — Liberty Mutual Insurance (2020–present)
- Underwrite property and casualty risk for middle-market commercial accounts,
  evaluating exposures, loss history, and pricing to meet loss-ratio targets.
- Structure policies, set premiums and terms, and negotiate renewals with brokers
  while ensuring regulatory compliance.
- Partner with actuarial and claims teams to refine pricing models and assess
  reinsurance needs on large accounts.

Underwriting Analyst — Continental Risk Group (2018–2020)
- Supported underwriting with risk assessment, exposure analysis, and account
  reviews; prepared quotes and maintained the policy book.

SKILLS
Insurance, underwriting, property and casualty, risk assessment, loss ratio,
premiums, policy, exposure, claims, reinsurance, pricing, broker relationships,
regulatory compliance, commercial lines, risk management

LICENSES & EDUCATION
Chartered Property Casualty Underwriter (CPCU) candidate
B.S. Risk Management & Insurance, St. John's University, 2018
